version_description: Luke Combs has played a show to which he used these chords. He kept his baby finger and ring finger on both b and e string throughout. The D/F# is just your index finger on 2nd fret. You can use different strumming patterns to make the song sound like original with these chords. It's the same throughout the hole song. The strumming pattern is similar to the one shown.

versions.version_description: I've made this version because I think it sounds more like the way he sings the song rather than the guitar in the background and it is also a lot easier to play for a beginner like myself because I have deleted barre chords and your pinky and ring finger can be locked in on the 2 top strings on the 3rd fret throughout the song except when it comes to Am and D. This is my first complete edit of a tab so it's not how he plays it, but I think it sounds good for a simplified version https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wronTfJF7Pk.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Daddy, I'm afraid, won't you stay a little while?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Keep me safe 'cause there's monsters right outside[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Daddy, please don't go, I don't wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
'Cause the second that you're gone they're gonna know[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Before he went to bed he grabbed my hand and said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Just 'cause I'm leavin'[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
It don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
When you need me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
And you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
It's okay, I know you're scared when I'm not here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
But I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Even though I'm leavin', I ain't goin' nowhere[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Dad, we'll be late, and Uncle Sam don't like to wait[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
I know I act tough, but there's a churnin' in my gut[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
'Cause I just can't call you up when things get rough[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Before I left, he hugged my neck and said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Just 'cause you're leavin'[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
It don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
When you need me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
And you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
It's okay, I know you're scared when I might be here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]

[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Daddy, I'm afraid, won't you stay a little while?[/tab]
